title: Golden Globe Awards 2026: Closing Odds and Results Summary
text: The 83rd Golden Globe Awards on January 11, 2026, saw remarkably predictable outcomes. According to the Sports Book Review analysis, all but two of the 11 major film categories went to betting favorites, with only two upsets occurring at modest odds. The biggest upset was Teyana Taylor winning Best Supporting Actress at +135 odds for One Battle After Another, narrowly edging Amy Madigan. Notable predictions versus outcomes include Best Drama Hamnet at +130 upsetting Sinners at -155, a rare surprise, while Best Director Paul Thomas Anderson dominated as expected with One Battle After Another. Best Animated Feature KPop Demon Hunters secured an overwhelming victory at -900 odds. The article notes that top sportsbooks absolutely nailed the odds this time around, suggesting extremely efficient betting markets. Most favorites delivered, making it an uneventful evening for those seeking dramatic upsets. The predictability led one analyst to conclude that dont expect any major surprises on the film side when the Oscars arrive in March.
